This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Focus navigation starting point should be maintained when slotted focused element is removed.
  assert_equals: Forwards sequential focus navigation should go to BUTTON# expected Element node <button data-next="" slot="d">button 4</button> but got Element node <button id="before-container">(before container)</button>
Harness: the test ran to completion.
